title: China Unicom | Cloud Computing Product Manager
content: Responsible for the full-process design of Unicom's cloud products, transforming complex underlying technologies into standardized, scalable, and easy-to-use business services.

title: Transsion | AIGC Product Manager Intern
content: Establish a text-to-image model evaluation system and complete multiple rounds of evaluation and testing. provide optimization suggestions based on the results, collaborate with the algorithm team to develop optimization plans, and follow up on the implementation and iteration.

title: JIDU Auto | Autonomous Driving Product Manager Intern
content: Responsible for building the intelligent driving scenario library, participating in the functional definition of the intelligent driving system, user demand research, and interface optimization.
